rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly examined the argument chain, identified multiple inconsistencies, and proposed fixes, demonstrating end-to-end engagement.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audited each load-bearing claim against evidence, flagging unsupported claims and suggesting further evaluations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainties effectively but could improve by explicitly marking confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output adhered strictly to the requested scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced, and the agent highlighted potential issues, ensuring no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked annotations, reducing traceability.
